channel.title: Network-Management on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Network-Management on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Network Topology Mapping — NetBox, LibreNMS & Auto-Discovery Tools
item.description: When your infrastructure grows beyond a handful of servers, keeping track of how everything connects — switches to routers, firewalls to servers, VLANs to subnets — becomes essential. Self-hosted network topology mapping tools automatically discover and visualize your network layout, generating real-time maps that show device relationships, link status, and traffic flows.
